THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUM, ANDREW LOW $4,320.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,745.00, PLTFF TO RECOVER PREMISES AT 370-5TH AVENUE FROM DEFTS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUM, ANDREW LOW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 370-5TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO $4,320.00 RENT, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,745.00, LEASE BETWEEN PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT IS FORFEITED.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KUM, ANDREW LOW
